plugins.name: Ocean Dark
plugins.author: l3ad3r1
plugins.description: A deep-blue dark theme with aqua accents.

plugins.name: Rose Light
plugins.author: l3ad3r1
plugins.description: A warm light theme with rose accents.

plugins.name: Midnight
plugins.author: l3ad3r1
plugins.description: A near-black midnight theme with soft periwinkle and moonlit indigo accents.

plugins.name: Midnight OLED
plugins.author: l3ad3r1
plugins.description: A true-black OLED variant of Midnight — pure #000000 surfaces with periwinkle accents to save battery.

plugins.name: Daybreak
plugins.author: l3ad3r1
plugins.description: A warm light theme washed in golden-hour amber — the sunrise companion to Midnight.

plugins.name: Text Tools
plugins.author: l3ad3r1
plugins.description: Editor commands: UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Slugify, word count.

plugins.name: Markdown Snippets
plugins.author: l3ad3r1
plugins.description: Insertable Markdown templates: callout, table, code block, task list, front-matter.

plugins.name: Note Actions
plugins.author: l3ad3r1
plugins.description: Create new notes from the editor: duplicate the note, or split its tasks out.
